# COSMOS Boxing — Full Content Index
# https://cosmosbox.pro
# llms-full.txt — complete structured content for AI agents and crawlers

---

## Site identity

- Brand: COSMOS
- Slogan: UNLOCKING POTENTIAL
- Domain: https://cosmosbox.pro
- Type: Personal boxing trainer landing page
- Languages: Russian (primary), Ukrainian (switchable)
- Location: Mallorca, Spain — Palmanova / Magaluf

---

## Trainer profile

- Full name: Valerii Sevchenko
- Age: 28 years old
- Nationality: Ukrainian
- Qualification: Candidate Master of Sports (KMS) in boxing — the highest amateur classification below Master of Sports in the post-Soviet system
- Education: Graduated from the Institute of Physical Culture and Sports
- Coaching experience: 6+ years professional
- Students trained: 100+
- Training philosophy: in-person sessions only — Valerii does not offer online training, believing that genuine progress requires live, hands-on coaching in the gym
- Specialisation: boxing technique, functional conditioning, strength, knockout power development

---

## Services

### 1. Personal session
- Price: 45€
- Duration: 60 minutes
- Format: individual, in-person, Mallorca
- Includes: technique analysis from scratch, pad and bag work, functional conditioning

### 2. Subscription — 5 sessions
- Price: 200€
- Sessions: 5 personal training sessions
- Saving: 25€ vs individual price
- Includes: priority scheduling, technique breakdown after every session

### 3. COSMOS PRO — 10 sessions + materials
- Price: 390€
- Sessions: 10 personal training sessions
- Saving: 60€ vs individual + exclusive content
- Bonus content:
  - Author video: "Top 20 exercises for a knockout punch"
  - Regular methodological materials: technique breakdowns, drills for independent practice, coaching guides

---

## Target audience

- Adults 16 years and older
- Residents and tourists in Mallorca (Palmanova, Magaluf, Calvia area)
- Beginners with zero boxing experience
- Intermediate practitioners wanting to improve technique
- People seeking weight loss, fitness or stress relief through boxing
- Women (no sparring unless requested)
- Teenagers 16+ (programme adapted to age and development)

---

## Training process (4 steps)

1. Sign up — fill form or message via Telegram / WhatsApp, pick a convenient time
2. Warm-up — 10–15 min: joint mobility, cardio warm-up, stretching
3. Technique and work — punches, defence, combinations on bags and pads; intensity matched to client level
4. Review and plan — post-session feedback, error analysis, homework for next time

---

## FAQ (key questions)

Q: Is physical fitness required to start?
A: No. All levels welcome. First session assesses your level; programme is built individually.

Q: From what age do you accept clients?
A: From 16 years old and above.

Q: What to bring to the first session?
A: Comfortable sportswear and water. Gloves and wraps available from the trainer. Regular clients advised to get their own gear.

Q: Can boxing be used for weight loss rather than fighting?
A: Absolutely. Most clients have no competition goals. One hour burns 600–800 kcal.

Q: How many sessions per week for results?
A: Optimal 2–3 times per week. Technique improvements visible in 2–3 weeks; physical changes in 4–6 weeks.

Q: Where are sessions held in Mallorca?
A: Palmanova / Magaluf area. Exact location confirmed at time of booking.

Q: Do you train women?
A: Yes. No sparring unless the client requests it — focus on technique and fitness.

Q: Can I cancel or reschedule?
A: Yes, with 12 hours notice. Less than 12 hours = session is used. Force majeure handled individually.

Q: Is there a trial session?
A: First consultation is free. Short meeting or call to discuss goals, fitness level and format. No obligations.

Q: How to pay?
A: Cash or bank transfer. Subscriptions paid upfront for the full block.

Q: What is included in COSMOS PRO?
A: 10 personal sessions + author video "Top 20 exercises for a knockout punch" + regular methodological materials: technique guides, drills for solo practice, coaching handbooks.

---

## Reviews (representative)

1. "Aleksei M., Mallorca, 3 months" — came as a complete beginner, within a month felt confident in stance, understood technique, maintained rhythm. Professional, clear explanations.

2. "Katya L., Magaluf, 3 months subscription" — took a 5-session subscription to try; now in her third month. Lost 6 kg, feels strong and confident. Best trainer in Mallorca.

3. "Dmitri V., Magaluf, personal sessions" — trains together with 17-year-old son. Valerii found the right approach to the teenager — motivates without pressure. KMS level visible: spots errors instantly and explains exactly how to fix them.
